scripts.build: pnpm run sync:specs && NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 node ./node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build
scripts.build:cloudflare: CLOUDFLARE_PAGES=1 pnpm run sync:specs && NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 node ./node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build
scripts.cf:project:create: node ./node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js pages project create biometrics-website --production-branch main
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: pnpm run build:cloudflare && node ./node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js pages deployment create out --project-name biometrics-website --branch ${CF_PAGES_BRANCH:-main} --commit-hash ${CF_PAGES_COMMIT_SHA:-manual} --commit-message "${CF_PAGES_COMMIT_MESSAGE:-manual deploy}" --commit-dirty=true --skip-caching
scripts.test:content: pnpm run test:frontmatter && pnpm run test:links && pnpm run test:locales && pnpm run test:structured && pnpm run test:sitemap
